title: Periodic Stream
description: Create a stream that emits an increasing counter every second.
problemStatement:
Streams handle a 'flow' of data. Use `Stream.periodic()` to emit a value every second. Use `.take(4)` to stop the stream after 4 emissions.

**Requirement:** Print each emitted value.

**Expected Output:** 
`0` 
`1` 
`2` 
`3`
